title: Blueprint Swarm - Playbook Synthesis
description: Sales playbook intelligence extracted from call patterns — best discovery questions, objection handlers, and closing patterns

question.description: The discovery question as asked by the seller (or improved version based on patterns)

context.description: When to use this question — stage, persona, situation (e.g., 'Early discovery with technical evaluator', 'Budget qualification with economic buyer')

effectiveness.description: How effective this question is at unlocking meaningful information, based on what followed in the conversation

example_use.description: Example of this question being used effectively in a real call — include the question and the response it generated

discovery_questions.description: Most effective discovery questions observed across calls, ranked by effectiveness

objection.description: The objection as expressed by prospects/customers (e.g., 'Your price is too high compared to X', 'We don't have budget this quarter')

best_response.description: The most effective response observed or synthesized from multiple calls

success_rate.description: How often this response successfully resolved the objection

example_use.description: Real example of this objection being handled — include the objection, the response, and what happened next

objection_handlers.description: Common objections with the best responses observed, ranked by frequency and success rate

pattern.description: Description of the closing pattern or technique (e.g., 'ROI-anchored close with champion pre-alignment', 'Trial-to-paid conversion with success metrics')

context.description: When this pattern works best — deal size, persona, competitive situation

effectiveness.description: How effective this closing pattern is based on observed outcomes

closing_patterns.description: Closing patterns and techniques observed in won deals, ranked by effectiveness
